overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment resembling Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The player walks through a vibrant downtown district with towering glass buildings, digital billboards, elevated transit structures, and cherry blossom trees, eventually ascending a large orange staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with elevated transit overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to modern buildings, passing palm trees and digital advertisements

entered.detail: futuristic green monorail track structure spanning overhead between buildings
tall palm trees planted along the sidewalk edge
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and large digital billboards
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk with towering glass buildings and an elevated green transit structure overhead. The camera moves forward past palm trees and digital billboards while sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic moves through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with food vendors and cherry blossoms

events.description: passing colorful food stalls and vendor stands on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past food vendors, approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: person in patterned jacket walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: colorful vendor stall with illuminated menu displays and traditional styling
tree with pink blossoms planted in the pedestrian plaza area

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past food stalls on the right featuring illuminated menus, while cherry blossom trees line the approach to a major intersection. A pedestrian passes closely by on the left as the scene transitions toward the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with large digital billboards and crosswalk

events.description: crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk with other pedestrians
reaching the opposite side of the intersection with large digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians, moving toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in colorful clothing crossing the street together

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes and green WALK markings
massive building-sized digital display showing advertisements with human faces

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit intersection where the camera crosses yellow-striped crosswalk markings with a crowd of pedestrians. Massive digital billboards cover the buildings on the right, while the group moves together across the street to the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with transit station and vehicle traffic

events.description: stepping from sidewalk onto the street level to approach the transit staircase

agents.ego_description: walking along the street level past storefronts and vehicles, approaching the large staircase structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic cars driving along the street in both directions

entered.detail: large public staircase with orange steps and green structural supports leading upward
green and orange elevated station platform with access stairs

segments.scene_description: Moving along the street level with moderate vehicle traffic passing by, the camera approaches a distinctive orange staircase structure. Storefronts line the right side while the green transit station looms ahead on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered public staircase with green structural beams

events.description: entering the covered staircase structure with overhead green beams and lighting
continuing to ascend the orange stairs under the enclosed canopy structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide orange staircase upward through the covered transit structure

entered.detail: green painted metal support beams and overhead canopy covering the staircase
enclosed ceiling with embedded lighting fixtures and geometric green panels

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered staircase with bright orange steps and distinctive green structural beams overhead. Ascending steadily, the enclosed stairwell features overhead lighting and scattered debris, transitioning from the open street to the elevated transit level above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a vibrant futuristic downtown district that transitions from an open city sidewalk to an elevated transit level. It begins by moving past towering glass buildings and an overhead green transit structure, gliding past palm trees and digital billboards. As the camera advances, it passes illuminated food stalls and cherry blossom trees before merging into a crowd of pedestrians crossing a wide, sunlit intersection marked by yellow stripes and massive digital displays. The scene then shifts back to street level, moving past storefronts and moderate vehicle traffic toward a distinctive orange staircase. Finally, the camera enters the semi-covered stairwell, ascending the bright orange steps under green structural beams and overhead lighting to leave the street behind.
